name: Reach the top
short_description: Challenge yourself in this dark-ominous indie game. Navigate 3D world filled with obstacles & diverse movement options. Master platforming & flight as you soar in the air, dodge obstacles and enemies in order to reach the very top.
detailed_description:
Developer's notes

If you have ideas for changes for this game, or for a game i will be making in the future,
then please join my discord server and share it.
I am going to implement new languages for the the Interface soon, and i am thinking of
adding a feature in the future where the player will be able to choose between a couple a characters
to play the game with.


About the Game

This is a 3D Platformer game in which the goal is to get to the top!


In this game you will have multiple abilities which you can use to advance upward. Your main ability is to place two crystals and pull towards them, however you cannot place them on any surface. You will also be using jumping and dashing to avoid obstacles and advance upward, you will be able
to gather rewards which will unlock your ability to perform a very strong jump in a target direction.

Your opposition will be made up of two sentries: one which will be trying to shoot you down derail you from your progress, and the other one will teleport you to its target receiver if you stay within its range long enough. There will be also mines which if you touch will explode and push you away from the platform, and traps that are designed to make you fall.
Last but not least, there will be dragons which will chase you down as soon as you are near them and will attempt to push you away and down to fall, and prevent you from progressing upwards. There are ways in which you can reset some of your abilities which you need to explore so you can do you your best performance in expertly avoiding the opposition and advancing swiftly and accurately without skipping a beat.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain
*languages with full audio support

reviews.review_text: I really enjoyed this game. At times it seems impossible but you could work around the obstacles in front of you. If you like movement mechanics I would recommend you try the game. There are some movements that make the game easier once you understand how it works and your whole experience with the game will change. The game is obviously still being developed, however I think there's a lot of potential. I would love to see free play modes or different kind of difficulties and perhaps a more in-depth tutorial for things like wall-jumping or how the 2 different crystals work.

Hi. To be honest, I couldn't even pass the first level of the game, but I really enjoyed flying. It's really beautiful. If only it would be possible to fly without restrictions without waiting for super jumps.
